scope.city_hub: Pune operational hub: Chakan, Bhosari, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Sanaswadi, Pirangut and nearby Pune industrial belt

cautions: Private-company revenue ranges should be re-checked through MCA/Tofler/EMIS before outreach.
Minilec is retained as probable Federer because product and operations fit is strong, but revenue proof is weaker than the other 24.
Kinetic Engineering is retained because Pune is the decision hub, but the main manufacturing facility is outside Pune in Ahilyanagar.
